summary: Verstappen hunts redemption at Spa after back-to-back high-speed crashes force Red Bull into a defensive wing setup change, while Mercedes' Antonelli flexes early pace to challenge for the weekend. McLaren's Norris battles a 10-place grid penalty that could reshape the podium fight, creating an opening for midfield opportunists in the high-speed corners. A Verstappen victory would reassert Red Bull's championship dominance, but any slip-up hands crucial points to rivals capitalizing on his mechanical setback.
